full_text:
Li Jin 李進
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Jin (李進)was born in Shengshi. Defeated Lü Bu’s attack of his home town Shengshi. Li Jin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
